title: Maxed Optimized
description: A Modpack For Low-End PC's Fps Boost And Also To get Your PVP Better!
body:
# **MAXED OPTIMIZED**

This Modpack Is Actually Made For Low-End PCs and High-End PCs too and also it will help you to Optimize your PVP . It has many mods to Optimize your PC for better Performance and also PvP Mods to help you better at Minecraft too . Here are the list of some of the Mods :

## **OPTIMIZATION MODS**

1_ Video Tape And GPU Tape Mod : 
                                 Both of these Mods are so good for Low End PC Optimizations for GPU Memory . It will increase the Performance and help you for a better gameplay . https://modrinth.com/mod/videotape and https://modrinth.com/mod/gputape
  
2_ ThreatendGL Mod :
                     This mod change your OpenGl version from 3.2.0 to 4.6 . This will increase so much Fps and Have you a great Performance But If you dont have a GPU dont use this mod . https://modrinth.com/mod/threatengl

3_ Bobby : 
          I would not recommend you using this mod if u have a really bad PC but if u had a slightly better PC this mod will help you by saving ur chunks . I will recommend using Nvidium with this mod . https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby and https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium

## **PVP MODS**

1_ Bactro Mod :
                 This mod will help you in PvP like by having you a Customizable Small Shield and it aslo have different utilities like No Pumpkin Blur , No Fog etc . https://modrinth.com/mod/bactromod

2_ Marlow Crystal Optimizer : 
                                Have you ever noticed when u have bad ping in server your crystal breaking speed is so low ? If you had let this mod solve this problem . This mod will increase will your crystal speed no matter what is your ping . https://modrinth.com/mod/marlow-crystal-optimizer

3_ Shield Status : 
                    This mod will let you see whether your opponet's shield is broken or not by adding custom colours for shield disabled and shield enabled . https://modrinth.com/mod/shield-statuses
